algorithms.name: template
algorithms.description: Tokenizes entries and extracts patterns with variable slots
algorithms.best_for: Structured logs with clear token patterns (timestamps, IDs, numbers)

algorithms.name: clustering
algorithms.description: Groups similar entries using Levenshtein edit distance
algorithms.best_for: Entries that differ only in IDs, numbers, or small textual variations

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: Maximum edit distance for grouping (0.0 = identical only, 1.0 = any difference)

algorithms.name: ngram
algorithms.description: Identifies entries with rare word combinations using n-gram frequency analysis
algorithms.best_for: Finding unusual entries in mostly uniform logs

parameters.name: outlier_threshold
parameters.description: Outlier threshold for rarity score. 0.0 = auto-detect bottom ~5%

algorithms.name: schema
algorithms.description: Groups JSON objects by structural similarity (matching field names and types)
algorithms.best_for: JSON data with varying schemas, API responses, configuration files

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: Fraction of fields that must match (1.0 = exact schema match, 0.8 = 80% field overlap)

formatters.name: markdown
formatters.description: Human-readable markdown format with sections, tables, and code blocks

formatters.name: json
formatters.description: Machine-readable JSON format with full structured output

sub_options.name: entry-mode
sub_options.description: How to parse entries: single-line, multi-line (stack traces), or auto-detect

input_formats.name: json-map
input_formats.description: JSON object/map where each value is analyzed
